CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $300.00 FILED BY MOORE STEPHEN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAVID MORRIS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE STEPHEN PLNTF. FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
